metadata.title: MCS - Multilingual Communication System
metadata.description: Break language barriers instantly. Enable seamless collaboration between Japan, the Philippines, and global teams through a secure, workspace-based multilingual communication platform.

hero.heading: Break Language Barriers.
hero.subheading: Enable seamless multilingual communication with real-time translation for teams around the world.

challenge.label: The Problem
challenge.heading: Cross-Border Communication Is Broken
challenge.subheading: Companies operating between Japan and the Philippines face daily friction from fragmented tools and manual translation workflows.

cost.title: High Operational Costs
cost.description: Heavy reliance on interpreters and bilingual staffing inflates budgets significantly.

delays.title: Delayed Responses
delays.description: Translation bottlenecks slow down every interaction between multilingual teams.

miscommunication.title: Miscommunication Risk
miscommunication.description: Nuances lost in translation directly impact service quality and client relationships.

security.title: Security Fragmentation
security.description: Using multiple external tools creates data leakage risks and compliance gaps.

advantage.label: The Solution
advantage.heading: The MCS Advantage
advantage.description: MCS enables real-time multilingual communication within secure, isolated workspaces. Teams communicate in their preferred language while the system translates instantly within structured channels and groups — no external tools, no delays, no data exposure.

realtime.title: Real-Time Multilingual Messaging
realtime.description: Instantly translate conversations across English, Japanese, and Chinese within channels, groups, or individual discussions. Every message is delivered in each participant's language.

workspace.title: Workspace-Based Data Isolation
workspace.description: Each organization operates within a dedicated workspace ensuring confidentiality and preventing cross-client data exposure.

control.title: Structured Communication Control
control.description: Manage conversations through controlled channels and segmented groups with role-based access permissions.

responsive.title: Responsive Web & Mobile Access
responsive.description: Optimized interface for distributed teams working across multiple locations and devices.

security.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
security.description: Encrypted communication, permission management, and secure cloud infrastructure built for enterprise environments.

reduceCost.title: Reduce Operational Cost
reduceCost.description: Minimize reliance on manual translation and additional bilingual staffing overhead.

improveSpeed.title: Improve Response Speed
improveSpeed.description: Enable direct communication without waiting for interpretation layers or handoffs.

enhanceQuality.title: Enhance Service Quality
enhanceQuality.description: Maintain consistency and accuracy in messaging across regions and languages.

collaboration.title: Strengthen Cross-Border Collaboration
collaboration.description: Align headquarters and overseas teams effortlessly with seamless, real-time communication and collaboration.

confidentiality.title: Protect Client Confidentiality
confidentiality.description: Dedicated workspaces ensure secure, isolated information handling with enterprise-grade access controls.

useCase.label: In Practice
useCase.heading: Japan–Philippines Operational Collaboration
useCase.description: A Japanese headquarters managing a customer support team in the Philippines uses MCS to eliminate language-driven delays entirely.

steps.step2: Philippine team members respond in English
steps.step3: Messages are translated in real time within the same workspace
steps.step4: Channels separate operations, QA, and client discussions
steps.step5: Confidential data remains isolated within the company workspace

foundingPartner.label: Limited Opportunity
foundingPartner.heading: Become a Founding Partner of Chateaze
foundingPartner.description: We are inviting a limited number of organizations to participate in the MCS Founding Partner Program and gain early access to our multilingual communication platform designed for cross-border collaboration.

benefits.earlyAccess: Early access to the Chateaze platform
benefits.influence: Opportunity to influence future product development

foundingPartner.limitedNotice: Limited to the first 10 qualified companies.
foundingPartner.applyNotice: Apply now to secure your spot.

cta.heading: Transform Your Cross-Border Communication
cta.description: Empower your teams to collaborate globally without language barriers. Discover how MCS can support your organization.

footer.copyright: © 2026 MCS – Easycom Japan Philippines Inc. All rights reserved.

hero.heading: Become a
hero.subheading: Join a limited group of organizations participating in the pilot launch of the MCS platform and help shape the future of multilingual collaboration.

benefits.discount: 30% launch discount for the first 3 months

credibility.description: Designed for organizations working across languages and borders. MCS enables teams to communicate, coordinate, and collaborate — regardless of language.

explanation.label: About the Program
explanation.heading: What is the Founding Partner Program?
explanation.subheading: A unique early-access opportunity for a small group of forward-thinking organizations.

earlyAccess.title: Early Access Opportunity
earlyAccess.description: The MCS Founding Partner Program invites a small group of organizations to participate in the pilot launch of the MCS platform. Selected partners gain early platform access and work directly with the product team to help refine the system before full commercial rollout.

whatYouGet.title: What You Get in Return
whatYouGet.description: In return, partners receive a limited-time launch incentive — a 30% discount on the first 3 months of subscription — along with priority onboarding support and a direct line to the MCS product team throughout the pilot phase.

benefits.label: Program Benefits
benefits.heading: Founding Partner Benefits
benefits.subheading: Everything you receive as a confirmed MCS Founding Partner.

discount.title: 30% Launch Discount
discount.description: Receive a 30% discount on the first 3 months of your MCS subscription.

earlyAccess.title: Early Platform Access
earlyAccess.description: Be among the first organizations to use the MCS system before full public launch.

onboarding.title: Priority Onboarding Support
onboarding.description: Our team assists directly with your setup, configuration, and onboarding process.

feedback.title: Product Feedback Influence
feedback.description: Your direct feedback helps shape the MCS product roadmap and feature priorities.

access.title: Direct Product Team Access
access.description: Communicate directly with the MCS product team throughout the pilot period.

status.title: Founding Partner Status
status.description: Be recognized as a founding organization that helped build the MCS platform.

whoIsThisFor.label: Ideal Participants
whoIsThisFor.heading: Who This Program is For
whoIsThisFor.subheading: This program is best suited for organizations ready to move quickly and collaborate closely with the MCS team.

criteria.crossBorder: Work with international or cross-border teams
criteria.earlyAccess: Want early access to emerging communication technology
criteria.feedback: Are willing to provide structured product feedback
criteria.commitment: Can commit to a 3-month pilot engagement

platformPreview.label: Platform Preview
platformPreview.heading: See the MCS Platform in Action
platformPreview.subheading: A first look at what your team will be working with during the pilot.

howItWorks.label: Program Process
howItWorks.heading: How the Program Works
howItWorks.subheading: Five simple steps from application to pilot activation.

step1.title: Submit Application
step1.description: Complete the short application form below.

step2.title: Qualification Review
step2.description: Our team reviews your application within 3 business days.

step3.title: Product Walkthrough
step3.description: Attend a live walkthrough of the MCS platform.

step4.title: Partner Confirmation
step4.description: Receive your Founding Partner confirmation and invoice.

step5.title: Start 3-Month Pilot
step5.description: Your team is onboarded and the pilot begins.

pilotTerms.label: Pilot Program Structure
pilotTerms.heading: Pilot Program Terms
pilotTerms.subheading: Simple, transparent terms for Founding Partners.

items.discount: 30% discounted subscription for the first 3 months
items.invoice: Pilot subscription invoiced upfront before activation
items.access: Direct access to the MCS product team

items.billing: Billing shifts to regular monthly subscription
items.platformAccess: Continued platform access with full feature set

scarcity.heading: Limited Founding Partner Slots
scarcity.description: To ensure proper onboarding and close collaboration, the program is strictly limited to 10 organizations. Once slots are filled, the program will close.

applicationForm.label: Apply Now
applicationForm.heading: Apply for the Founding Partner Program
applicationForm.subheading: Complete the form below and our team will be in touch within 3 business days.

fields.name: Contact Name *
fields.message: Anything else you'd like us to know?
fields.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your team, language needs, or goals...

errors.requiredFields: Please complete all required fields before submitting.

applicationForm.success: Thank you for applying! The MCS team will contact you soon.
applicationForm.requiredNote: * Required fields. By submitting, you agree to be contacted by the MCS team regarding your application.

finalCta.label: Don't Miss Out
finalCta.heading: Help Shape the Future of MCS
finalCta.description: Join the first group of organizations using the MCS platform and help define how multilingual collaboration is built.
finalCta.notice: Apply today — only 10 founding partner slots available.
